A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: e $-> a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d))
g: e $-> a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d))
p: a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ f $== g
?Goal0 $== ?Goal2 ∘ a ⊗R twist c b d
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: e $-> a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d))
g: e $-> a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d))
p: a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ f $== g
emap01 cat_tensor a (twiste b c d) $-> ?Goal2

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: e $-> a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d))
g: e $-> a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d))
p: a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ f $== g
?Goal0 $== a ⊗R twiste b c d ∘ a ⊗R twist c b d

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: e $-> a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d))
g: e $-> a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d))
p: a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ f $== g
Id (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d)) $== twiste b c d ∘ twist c b d

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: e $-> a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d))
g: e $-> a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d))
p: a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ f $== g
?Goal1 ∘ twist c b d $-> Id (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d))

IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: e $-> a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d))
g: e $-> a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d))
p: a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ f $== g
twiste b c d $-> ?Goal1

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: e $-> a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d))
g: e $-> a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d))
p: a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ f $== g
twist b c d ∘ twist c b d $-> Id (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d))

      apply twist_twist. 
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: e $-> a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d))
g: e $-> a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d))
p: a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ f $== g
emap01 cat_tensor a (twiste b c d) ∘ f $== Id (a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d))) ∘ g

IsGraph0: IsGraph A

H: Is1Cat A

cat_tensor_unit: A

Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0

twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0

c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0

a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: e $-> a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d))
g: e $-> a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d))
p: a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ f $== g
emap01 cat_tensor a (twiste b c d) $== a ⊗R twist b c d

(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==

a, b, c, d, e: A
f: e $-> a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d))
g: e $-> a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d))
p: a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ f $== g
twiste b c d $== twist b c d

A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d)) $-> e
g: a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d)) $-> e
f ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== g -> f $== g ∘ a ⊗R twist c b d

IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A

Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0

twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit

a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0

f: a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d)) $-> e
g: a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d)) $-> e
f ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== g -> f $== g ∘ a ⊗R twist c b d

IsGraph0: IsGraph A

H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0

c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0

∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d)) $-> e
g: a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d)) $-> e
p: f ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== g
f $== g ∘ a ⊗R twist c b d

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d)) $-> e
g: a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d)) $-> e
p: f ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== g
f ∘ emap01 cat_tensor a (twiste b c d) $== g ∘ a ⊗R twist c b d
∘ emap01 cat_tensor a (twiste b c d)

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d)) $-> e
g: a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d)) $-> e
p: f ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== g
f ∘ emap01 cat_tensor a (twiste b c d) $== g
∘ (a ⊗R twist c b d ∘ emap01 cat_tensor a (twiste b c d))

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d)) $-> e
g: a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d)) $-> e
p: f ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== g
f ∘ emap01 cat_tensor a (twiste b c d) $== g ∘ ?Goal0
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d)) $-> e
g: a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d)) $-> e
p: f ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== g
?Goal0 $== a ⊗R twist c b d ∘ emap01 cat_tensor a (twiste b c d)

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d)) $-> e
g: a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d)) $-> e
p: f ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== g
?Goal0 $== a ⊗R twist c b d ∘ emap01 cat_tensor a (twiste b c d)
 
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d)) $-> e
g: a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d)) $-> e
p: f ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== g
a ⊗R twist c b d ∘ ?Goal2 $-> ?Goal0
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d)) $-> e
g: a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d)) $-> e
p: f ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== g
emap01 cat_tensor a (twiste b c d) $-> ?Goal2

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d)) $-> e
g: a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d)) $-> e
p: f ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== g
a ⊗R twist c b d ∘ a ⊗R twiste b c d $-> ?Goal0

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d)) $-> e
g: a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d)) $-> e
p: f ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== g
twist c b d ∘ twiste b c d $== Id (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d))

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d)) $-> e
g: a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d)) $-> e
p: f ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== g
twiste b c d $== ?Goal0
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d)) $-> e
g: a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d)) $-> e
p: f ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== g
twist c b d ∘ ?Goal0 $== Id (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d))

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d)) $-> e
g: a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d)) $-> e
p: f ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== g
twist c b d ∘ twist b c d $== Id (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d))

      apply twist_twist. 
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d)) $-> e
g: a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d)) $-> e
p: f ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== g
f ∘ emap01 cat_tensor a (twiste b c d) $== g ∘ Id (a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d)))

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d)) $-> e
g: a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d)) $-> e
p: f ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== g
emap01 cat_tensor a (twiste b c d) $== a ⊗R twist b c d

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d)) $-> e
g: a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d)) $-> e
p: f ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== g
twiste b c d $== twist b c d

    apply cate_buildequiv_fun.
  Defined.

  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: e $-> a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d))
g: e $-> a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d))
f $== a ⊗R twist c b d ∘ g -> a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ f $== g

  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: e $-> a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d))
g: e $-> a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d))
f $== a ⊗R twist c b d ∘ g -> a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ f $== g

    intros p; symmetry; apply moveL_fmap01_twistL; symmetry; exact p.
  Defined.

  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d)) $-> e
g: a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d)) $-> e
f $== g ∘ a ⊗R twist c b d -> f ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== g

  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a') (g0 : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, e: A
f: a ⊗ (c ⊗ (b ⊗ d)) $-> e
g: a ⊗ (b ⊗ (c ⊗ d)) $-> e
f $== g ∘ a ⊗R twist c b d -> f ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== g

    intros p; symmetry; apply moveL_fmap01_twistR; symmetry; exact p.
  Defined.

  (** *** The associator *)

  (** Using [braide] and [twiste] we can build an associator. *)
  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c: A
a ⊗ (b ⊗ c) $<~> (a ⊗ b) ⊗ c

  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c: A
a ⊗ (b ⊗ c) $<~> (a ⊗ b) ⊗ c

    (** We can build the associator out of [braide] and [twiste]. *)
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c: A
a ⊗ (b ⊗ c) $<~> c ⊗ (a ⊗ b)

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c: A
a ⊗ (b ⊗ c) $<~> a ⊗ (c ⊗ b)

    exact (emap01 cat_tensor a (braide _ _)).
  Defined.

  (** We would like to be able to unfold [associator_twist'] to the underlying morphisms. We use this lemma to make that process easier. *)
  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c: A
associator_twist' a b c $== braid c (a ⊗ b) ∘ (twist a c b ∘ a ⊗R braid b c)

  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c: A
associator_twist' a b c $== braid c (a ⊗ b) ∘ (twist a c b ∘ a ⊗R braid b c)

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c: A
twiste a c b $oE emap01 cat_tensor a (braide b c) $== 
twist a c b ∘ a ⊗R braid b c

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c: A
emap01 cat_tensor a (braide b c) $== a ⊗R braid b c

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c: A
braide b c $== braid b c

    apply cate_buildequiv_fun.
  Defined.

  (** Now we can use [associator_twist'] and show that it is a natural equivalence in each variable. *)
  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a b c : A, a ⊗ (b ⊗ c) $-> b ⊗ (a ⊗ c)
twist_twist: forall a b c : A, twist a b c ∘ twist b a c $== Id (b ⊗ (a ⊗ c))
twist_nat: forall (a a' b b' c c' : A) (f : a $-> a') (g : b $-> b') 
(h : c $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a b c
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a b : A,
a ⊗R right_unitor b $== braid b a ∘ b ⊗R right_unitor a
∘ twist a b cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a b c : A,
c ⊗R braid b a ∘ twist b c a ∘ b ⊗R braid a c $== 
twist a c b ∘ a ⊗R braid b c ∘ twist b a c
twist_9_gon: forall a b c d : A,
c ⊗R braid (a ⊗ b) d ∘ twist (a ⊗ b) c d ∘ braid (c ⊗ d) (a ⊗ b)
∘ twist a (c ⊗ d) b ∘ a ⊗R braid b (c ⊗ d) $== c ⊗R twist a d b
∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d) ∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d
Associator cat_tensor

  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a b c : A, a ⊗ (b ⊗ c) $-> b ⊗ (a ⊗ c)
twist_twist: forall a b c : A, twist a b c ∘ twist b a c $== Id (b ⊗ (a ⊗ c))
twist_nat: forall (a a' b b' c c' : A) (f : a $-> a') (g : b $-> b') 
(h : c $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a b c
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a b : A,
a ⊗R right_unitor b $== braid b a ∘ b ⊗R right_unitor a
∘ twist a b cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a b c : A,
c ⊗R braid b a ∘ twist b c a ∘ b ⊗R braid a c $== 
twist a c b ∘ a ⊗R braid b c ∘ twist b a c
twist_9_gon: forall a b c d : A,
c ⊗R braid (a ⊗ b) d ∘ twist (a ⊗ b) c d ∘ braid (c ⊗ d) (a ⊗ b)
∘ twist a (c ⊗ d) b ∘ a ⊗R braid b (c ⊗ d) $== c ⊗R twist a d b
∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d) ∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d
Associator cat_tensor

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a b c : A, a ⊗ (b ⊗ c) $-> b ⊗ (a ⊗ c)
twist_twist: forall a b c : A, twist a b c ∘ twist b a c $== Id (b ⊗ (a ⊗ c))
twist_nat: forall (a a' b b' c c' : A) (f : a $-> a') (g : b $-> b') 
(h : c $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a b c
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a b : A,
a ⊗R right_unitor b $== braid b a ∘ b ⊗R right_unitor a
∘ twist a b cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a b c : A,
c ⊗R braid b a ∘ twist b c a ∘ b ⊗R braid a c $== 
twist a c b ∘ a ⊗R braid b c ∘ twist b a c
twist_9_gon: forall a b c d : A,
c ⊗R braid (a ⊗ b) d ∘ twist (a ⊗ b) c d ∘ braid (c ⊗ d) (a ⊗ b)
∘ twist a (c ⊗ d) b ∘ a ⊗R braid b (c ⊗ d) $== c ⊗R twist a d b
∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d) ∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d
forall a b c : A, a ⊗ (b ⊗ c) $<~> (a ⊗ b) ⊗ c
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a b c : A, a ⊗ (b ⊗ c) $-> b ⊗ (a ⊗ c)
twist_twist: forall a b c : A, twist a b c ∘ twist b a c $== Id (b ⊗ (a ⊗ c))
twist_nat: forall (a a' b b' c c' : A) (f : a $-> a') (g : b $-> b') 
(h : c $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a b c
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a b : A,
a ⊗R right_unitor b $== braid b a ∘ b ⊗R right_unitor a
∘ twist a b cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a b c : A,
c ⊗R braid b a ∘ twist b c a ∘ b ⊗R braid a c $== 
twist a c b ∘ a ⊗R braid b c ∘ twist b a c
twist_9_gon: forall a b c d : A,
c ⊗R braid (a ⊗ b) d ∘ twist (a ⊗ b) c d ∘ braid (c ⊗ d) (a ⊗ b)
∘ twist a (c ⊗ d) b ∘ a ⊗R braid b (c ⊗ d) $== c ⊗R twist a d b
∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d) ∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d
Is1Natural
  (fun pat : A * A * A =>
   let x := pat in
   let fst := fst x in
   let c := snd x in
   let fst0 := fst in
   let a := Overture.fst fst0 in let b := snd fst0 in a ⊗ (b ⊗ c))
  (fun pat : A * A * A =>
   let x := pat in
   let fst := fst x in
   let c := snd x in
   let fst0 := fst in
   let a := Overture.fst fst0 in let b := snd fst0 in (a ⊗ b) ⊗ c)
  (fun pat : A * A * A =>
   let x := pat in
   let fst := fst x in
   let c := snd x in
   let fst0 := fst in
   let a := Overture.fst fst0 in let b := snd fst0 in ?associator a b c)

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a b c : A, a ⊗ (b ⊗ c) $-> b ⊗ (a ⊗ c)
twist_twist: forall a b c : A, twist a b c ∘ twist b a c $== Id (b ⊗ (a ⊗ c))
twist_nat: forall (a a' b b' c c' : A) (f : a $-> a') (g : b $-> b') 
(h : c $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a b c
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a b : A,
a ⊗R right_unitor b $== braid b a ∘ b ⊗R right_unitor a
∘ twist a b cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a b c : A,
c ⊗R braid b a ∘ twist b c a ∘ b ⊗R braid a c $== 
twist a c b ∘ a ⊗R braid b c ∘ twist b a c
twist_9_gon: forall a b c d : A,
c ⊗R braid (a ⊗ b) d ∘ twist (a ⊗ b) c d ∘ braid (c ⊗ d) (a ⊗ b)
∘ twist a (c ⊗ d) b ∘ a ⊗R braid b (c ⊗ d) $== c ⊗R twist a d b
∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d) ∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d
forall a b c : A, a ⊗ (b ⊗ c) $<~> (a ⊗ b) ⊗ c
 exact associator_twist'.
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a b c : A, a ⊗ (b ⊗ c) $-> b ⊗ (a ⊗ c)
twist_twist: forall a b c : A, twist a b c ∘ twist b a c $== Id (b ⊗ (a ⊗ c))
twist_nat: forall (a a' b b' c c' : A) (f : a $-> a') (g : b $-> b') 
(h : c $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a b c
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a b : A,
a ⊗R right_unitor b $== braid b a ∘ b ⊗R right_unitor a
∘ twist a b cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a b c : A,
c ⊗R braid b a ∘ twist b c a ∘ b ⊗R braid a c $== 
twist a c b ∘ a ⊗R braid b c ∘ twist b a c
twist_9_gon: forall a b c d : A,
c ⊗R braid (a ⊗ b) d ∘ twist (a ⊗ b) c d ∘ braid (c ⊗ d) (a ⊗ b)
∘ twist a (c ⊗ d) b ∘ a ⊗R braid b (c ⊗ d) $== c ⊗R twist a d b
∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d) ∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d
Is1Natural
  (fun pat : A * A * A =>
   let x := pat in
   let fst := fst x in
   let c := snd x in
   let fst0 := fst in
   let a := Overture.fst fst0 in let b := snd fst0 in a ⊗ (b ⊗ c))
  (fun pat : A * A * A =>
   let x := pat in
   let fst := fst x in
   let c := snd x in
   let fst0 := fst in
   let a := Overture.fst fst0 in let b := snd fst0 in (a ⊗ b) ⊗ c)
  (fun pat : A * A * A =>
   let x := pat in
   let fst := fst x in
   let c := snd x in
   let fst0 := fst in
   let a := Overture.fst fst0 in let b := snd fst0 in associator_twist' a b c)
 
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a b c : A, a ⊗ (b ⊗ c) $-> b ⊗ (a ⊗ c)
twist_twist: forall a b c : A, twist a b c ∘ twist b a c $== Id (b ⊗ (a ⊗ c))
twist_nat: forall (a a' b b' c c' : A) (f : a $-> a') (g : b $-> b') 
(h : c $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a b c
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a b : A,
a ⊗R right_unitor b $== braid b a ∘ b ⊗R right_unitor a
∘ twist a b cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a b c : A,
c ⊗R braid b a ∘ twist b c a ∘ b ⊗R braid a c $== 
twist a c b ∘ a ⊗R braid b c ∘ twist b a c
twist_9_gon: forall a b c d : A,
c ⊗R braid (a ⊗ b) d ∘ twist (a ⊗ b) c d ∘ braid (c ⊗ d) (a ⊗ b)
∘ twist a (c ⊗ d) b ∘ a ⊗R braid b (c ⊗ d) $== c ⊗R twist a d b
∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d) ∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d
forall (a a' : A * A * A) (f : a $-> a'),
(fun pat : A * A * A =>
 let x := pat in
 let fst := fst x in
 let c := snd x in
 let fst0 := fst in
 let a0 := Overture.fst fst0 in
 let b := snd fst0 in cate_fun (associator_twist' a0 b c)) a'
∘ fmap (uncurry (uncurry (fun x y z : A => x ⊗ (y ⊗ z)))) f $==
fmap (uncurry (uncurry (fun x y z : A => (x ⊗ y) ⊗ z))) f
∘ (fun pat : A * A * A =>
   let x := pat in
   let fst := fst x in
   let c := snd x in
   let fst0 := fst in
   let a0 := Overture.fst fst0 in
   let b := snd fst0 in cate_fun (associator_twist' a0 b c)) a

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a'0 b0 b'0 c0 c'0 : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a'0) 
(g0 : b0 $-> b'0) (h0 : c0 $-> c'0),
twist a'0 b'0 c'0 ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h0) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h0) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c, a', b', c': A
f: a $-> a'
g: b $-> b'
h: c $-> c'
associator_twist' a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap (uncurry cat_tensor) (fmap (uncurry cat_tensor) (f, g), h)
∘ associator_twist' a b c

      (** To prove naturality it will be easier to reason about squares. *)
      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a'0 b0 b'0 c0 c'0 : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a'0) 
(g0 : b0 $-> b'0) (h0 : c0 $-> c'0),
twist a'0 b'0 c'0 ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h0) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h0) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c, a', b', c': A
f: a $-> a'
g: b $-> b'
h: c $-> c'
Square (associator_twist' a b c) (associator_twist' a' b' c')
  (fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h))
  (fmap (uncurry cat_tensor) (fmap (uncurry cat_tensor) (f, g), h))

      (** First we remove all the equivalences from the equation. *)
      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a'0 b0 b'0 c0 c'0 : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a'0) 
(g0 : b0 $-> b'0) (h0 : c0 $-> c'0),
twist a'0 b'0 c'0 ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h0) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h0) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c, a', b', c': A
f: a $-> a'
g: b $-> b'
h: c $-> c'
associator_twist' a b c $== ?Goal
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a'0 b0 b'0 c0 c'0 : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a'0) 
(g0 : b0 $-> b'0) (h0 : c0 $-> c'0),
twist a'0 b'0 c'0 ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h0) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h0) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c, a', b', c': A
f: a $-> a'
g: b $-> b'
h: c $-> c'
Square ?Goal (associator_twist' a' b' c')
  (fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h))
  (fmap (uncurry cat_tensor) (fmap (uncurry cat_tensor) (f, g), h))

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a'0 b0 b'0 c0 c'0 : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a'0) 
(g0 : b0 $-> b'0) (h0 : c0 $-> c'0),
twist a'0 b'0 c'0 ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h0) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h0) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c, a', b', c': A
f: a $-> a'
g: b $-> b'
h: c $-> c'
Square (braid c (a ⊗ b) ∘ (twist a c b ∘ a ⊗R braid b c))
  (associator_twist' a' b' c') (fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h))
  (fmap (uncurry cat_tensor) (fmap (uncurry cat_tensor) (f, g), h))

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a'0 b0 b'0 c0 c'0 : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a'0) 
(g0 : b0 $-> b'0) (h0 : c0 $-> c'0),
twist a'0 b'0 c'0 ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h0) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h0) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c, a', b', c': A
f: a $-> a'
g: b $-> b'
h: c $-> c'
Square (braid c (a ⊗ b) ∘ (twist a c b ∘ a ⊗R braid b c)) 
  ?Goal (fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h))
  (fmap (uncurry cat_tensor) (fmap (uncurry cat_tensor) (f, g), h))
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a'0 b0 b'0 c0 c'0 : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a'0) 
(g0 : b0 $-> b'0) (h0 : c0 $-> c'0),
twist a'0 b'0 c'0 ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h0) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h0) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c, a', b', c': A
f: a $-> a'
g: b $-> b'
h: c $-> c'
associator_twist' a' b' c' $== ?Goal

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a'0 b0 b'0 c0 c'0 : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a'0) 
(g0 : b0 $-> b'0) (h0 : c0 $-> c'0),
twist a'0 b'0 c'0 ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h0) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h0) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c, a', b', c': A
f: a $-> a'
g: b $-> b'
h: c $-> c'
Square (braid c (a ⊗ b) ∘ (twist a c b ∘ a ⊗R braid b c))
  (braid c' (a' ⊗ b') ∘ (twist a' c' b' ∘ a' ⊗R braid b' c'))
  (fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h))
  (fmap (uncurry cat_tensor) (fmap (uncurry cat_tensor) (f, g), h))

      (** The first square involving [braid] on its own is a naturality square. *)
      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a'0 b0 b'0 c0 c'0 : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a'0) 
(g0 : b0 $-> b'0) (h0 : c0 $-> c'0),
twist a'0 b'0 c'0 ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h0) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h0) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c, a', b', c': A
f: a $-> a'
g: b $-> b'
h: c $-> c'
Square (twist a c b ∘ a ⊗R braid b c) (twist a' c' b' ∘ a' ⊗R braid b' c')
  (fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h)) ?Goal
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a'0 b0 b'0 c0 c'0 : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a'0) 
(g0 : b0 $-> b'0) (h0 : c0 $-> c'0),
twist a'0 b'0 c'0 ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h0) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h0) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c, a', b', c': A
f: a $-> a'
g: b $-> b'
h: c $-> c'
Square (braid c (a ⊗ b)) (braid c' (a' ⊗ b')) ?Goal
  (fmap (uncurry cat_tensor) (fmap (uncurry cat_tensor) (f, g), h))

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a'0 b0 b'0 c0 c'0 : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a'0) 
(g0 : b0 $-> b'0) (h0 : c0 $-> c'0),
twist a'0 b'0 c'0 ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f0 (fmap11 cat_tensor g0 h0) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g0 (fmap11 cat_tensor f0 h0) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c, a', b', c': A
f: a $-> a'
g: b $-> b'
h: c $-> c'
Square (twist a c b ∘ a ⊗R braid b c) (twist a' c' b' ∘ a' ⊗R braid b' c')
  (fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h))
  (fmap11 cat_tensor h (fmap (uncurry cat_tensor) (f, g)))

      (** The second square is just the naturality of twist. *)
      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
