IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c: A
braid b a ⊗L c ∘ braid c (b ⊗ a) ∘ twist b c a $== 
braid c (a ⊗ b) ∘ (twist a c b ∘ a ⊗R braid b c) ∘ 
braid (b ⊗ c) a ∘ (braid a (b ⊗ c) ∘ (twist b a c ∘ b ⊗R braid c a))

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c: A
braid b a ⊗L c ∘ braid c (b ⊗ a) ∘ twist b c a $== 
braid c (a ⊗ b) ∘ (twist a c b ∘ a ⊗R braid b c) ∘ 
braid (b ⊗ c) a ∘ braid a (b ⊗ c) ∘ (twist b a c ∘ b ⊗R braid c a)

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c: A
braid b a ⊗L c ∘ braid c (b ⊗ a) ∘ twist b c a $== 
braid c (a ⊗ b) ∘ (twist a c b ∘ a ⊗R braid b c)
∘ (braid (b ⊗ c) a ∘ braid a (b ⊗ c)) ∘ (twist b a c ∘ b ⊗R braid c a)

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c: A
braid b a ⊗L c ∘ braid c (b ⊗ a) ∘ twist b c a $== 
braid c (a ⊗ b) ∘ (twist a c b ∘ a ⊗R braid b c)
∘ (twist b a c ∘ b ⊗R braid c a)
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c: A
braid (b ⊗ c) a ∘ braid a (b ⊗ c) $-> Id (a ⊗ (b ⊗ c))

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c: A
braid b a ⊗L c ∘ braid c (b ⊗ a) ∘ twist b c a $== 
braid c (a ⊗ b) ∘ (twist a c b ∘ a ⊗R braid b c)
∘ (twist b a c ∘ b ⊗R braid c a)

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c: A
braid c (a ⊗ b) ∘ c ⊗R braid b a ∘ twist b c a $== 
braid c (a ⊗ b) ∘ (twist a c b ∘ a ⊗R braid b c)
∘ (twist b a c ∘ b ⊗R braid c a)

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c: A
c ⊗R braid b a ∘ twist b c a $== twist a c b ∘ a ⊗R braid b c
∘ (twist b a c ∘ b ⊗R braid c a)

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c: A
c ⊗R braid b a ∘ twist b c a $== twist a c b ∘ a ⊗R braid b c ∘ 
twist b a c ∘ b ⊗R braid c a

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d ∘ braid (c0 ⊗ d) (a0 ⊗ b0)
∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d) b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d) $== 
c0 ⊗R twist a0 d b0 ∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d)
∘ a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d
a, b, c: A
c ⊗R braid b a ∘ twist b c a ∘ b ⊗R braid a c $== 
twist a c b ∘ a ⊗R braid b c ∘ twist b a c

    apply twist_hexagon.
  Defined.

  (** *** Conclusion *)

  (** In conclusion, we have proven the following: *)

  (** There is a monoidal structure on [A]. *)
  Instance ismonoidal_twist
    : IsMonoidal A cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
    := {}.

  (** There is a symmetric monoidal category on [A]. *)
  Instance issymmetricmonoidal_twist
    : IsSymmetricMonoidal A cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
    := {}.

  (** Here is a hexagon involving only twist. It might be easier to view this proof by opening [long_path_scope] using the notation above for [$==]. *)
  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
c ⊗R twist a b d ∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== 
twist b c (a ⊗ d) ∘ b ⊗R twist a c d ∘ twist a b (c ⊗ d)

  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
c ⊗R twist a b d ∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== 
twist b c (a ⊗ d) ∘ b ⊗R twist a c d ∘ twist a b (c ⊗ d)

    (** First we rewrite the last twist using our twist construction hexagon. *)
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
twist a b (c ⊗ d) $== b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a
∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b ∘ twist a (c ⊗ d) b ∘ a ⊗R braid b (c ⊗ d)
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
p: twist a b (c ⊗ d) $== b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a
∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b ∘ twist a (c ⊗ d) b ∘ a ⊗R braid b (c ⊗ d)
c ⊗R twist a b d ∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== 
twist b c (a ⊗ d) ∘ b ⊗R twist a c d ∘ twist a b (c ⊗ d)

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
twist a b (c ⊗ d) $== b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a
∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b ∘ twist a (c ⊗ d) b ∘ a ⊗R braid b (c ⊗ d)
 
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
twist a b (c ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) b $== b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a
∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a ∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b ∘ twist a (c ⊗ d) b

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
twist a b (c ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) b ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) a b $==
b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a ∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a ∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b $==
twist a b (c ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) b ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) a b

      apply twist_hexagon. 
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
p: twist a b (c ⊗ d) $== b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a
∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b ∘ twist a (c ⊗ d) b ∘ a ⊗R braid b (c ⊗ d)
c ⊗R twist a b d ∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== 
twist b c (a ⊗ d) ∘ b ⊗R twist a c d ∘ twist a b (c ⊗ d)

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
c ⊗R twist a b d ∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== 
twist b c (a ⊗ d) ∘ b ⊗R twist a c d
∘ (b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a ∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b
   ∘ twist a (c ⊗ d) b ∘ a ⊗R braid b (c ⊗ d))

    (** Next, we rewrite the first morphism on the LHS using the twist construction hexagon. *)
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
c ⊗R twist a b d $== c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid d a) ∘ c ⊗R twist d b a
∘ (c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b) ∘ c ⊗R twist a d b ∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d))
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
p: c ⊗R twist a b d $== c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid d a) ∘ c ⊗R twist d b a
∘ (c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b) ∘ c ⊗R twist a d b ∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d))
c ⊗R twist a b d ∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== 
twist b c (a ⊗ d) ∘ b ⊗R twist a c d
∘ (b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a ∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b
   ∘ twist a (c ⊗ d) b ∘ a ⊗R braid b (c ⊗ d))
 
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
c ⊗R twist a b d $== c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid d a) ∘ c ⊗R twist d b a
∘ (c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b) ∘ c ⊗R twist a d b ∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d))
 
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
c ⊗R twist a b d $== c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid d a) ∘ c ⊗R twist d b a
∘ (c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b ∘ twist a d b) ∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d))
 
      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
c ⊗R twist a b d $== c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid d a ∘ twist d b a)
∘ (c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b ∘ twist a d b) ∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d))
 
      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
c ⊗R twist a b d $== c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid d a ∘ twist d b a)
∘ c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b ∘ twist a d b ∘ a ⊗R braid b d)

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
twist a b d $== b ⊗R braid d a ∘ twist d b a
∘ (d ⊗R braid a b ∘ twist a d b ∘ a ⊗R braid b d)

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
twist a b d $== b ⊗R braid d a
∘ (twist d b a ∘ (d ⊗R braid a b ∘ twist a d b ∘ a ⊗R braid b d))

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
b ⊗R braid a d ∘ twist a b d $== twist d b a
∘ (d ⊗R braid a b ∘ twist a d b ∘ a ⊗R braid b d)

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
b ⊗R braid a d ∘ twist a b d $== twist d b a ∘ (d ⊗R braid a b ∘ twist a d b)
∘ a ⊗R braid b d

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
b ⊗R braid a d ∘ twist a b d ∘ a ⊗R braid d b $== 
twist d b a ∘ (d ⊗R braid a b ∘ twist a d b)

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
b ⊗R braid a d ∘ twist a b d ∘ a ⊗R braid d b $== 
twist d b a ∘ d ⊗R braid a b ∘ twist a d b

      apply twist_hexagon. 
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
p: c ⊗R twist a b d $== c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid d a) ∘ c ⊗R twist d b a
∘ (c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b) ∘ c ⊗R twist a d b ∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d))
c ⊗R twist a b d ∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== 
twist b c (a ⊗ d) ∘ b ⊗R twist a c d
∘ (b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a ∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b
   ∘ twist a (c ⊗ d) b ∘ a ⊗R braid b (c ⊗ d))

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid d a) ∘ c ⊗R twist d b a
∘ (c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b) ∘ c ⊗R twist a d b ∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d))
∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== twist b c (a ⊗ d)
∘ b ⊗R twist a c d
∘ (b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a ∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b
   ∘ twist a (c ⊗ d) b ∘ a ⊗R braid b (c ⊗ d))

    (** Now we rearrange the terms to get a symmetric 14-gon. *)
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid d a)
∘ (c ⊗R twist d b a
   ∘ (c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b) ∘ c ⊗R twist a d b ∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d)
      ∘ (twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d))) $==
twist b c (a ⊗ d) ∘ b ⊗R twist a c d
∘ (b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a ∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b
   ∘ twist a (c ⊗ d) b ∘ a ⊗R braid b (c ⊗ d))

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
c ⊗R twist d b a
∘ (c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b) ∘ c ⊗R twist a d b ∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d)
   ∘ (twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d)) $==
c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid a d)
∘ (twist b c (a ⊗ d) ∘ b ⊗R twist a c d
   ∘ (b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a ∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b
      ∘ twist a (c ⊗ d) b ∘ a ⊗R braid b (c ⊗ d)))

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b) ∘ c ⊗R twist a d b ∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d)
∘ (twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d) $== c ⊗R twist b d a
∘ (c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid a d)
   ∘ (twist b c (a ⊗ d) ∘ b ⊗R twist a c d
      ∘ (b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a ∘ 
         (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b ∘ twist a (c ⊗ d) b ∘ 
         a ⊗R braid b (c ⊗ d))))

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b) ∘ c ⊗R twist a d b ∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d)
∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== c ⊗R twist b d a
∘ (c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid a d)
   ∘ (twist b c (a ⊗ d) ∘ b ⊗R twist a c d
      ∘ (b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a ∘ 
         (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b ∘ twist a (c ⊗ d) b ∘ 
         a ⊗R braid b (c ⊗ d))))

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b) ∘ c ⊗R twist a d b ∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d)
∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d $== c ⊗R twist b d a
∘ c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid a d) ∘ (twist b c (a ⊗ d) ∘ b ⊗R twist a c d)
∘ (b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a ∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b
   ∘ twist a (c ⊗ d) b)
∘ a ⊗R braid b (c ⊗ d)

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b) ∘ c ⊗R twist a d b ∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d)
∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ a ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) b $==
c ⊗R twist b d a ∘ c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid a d)
∘ (twist b c (a ⊗ d) ∘ b ⊗R twist a c d)
∘ (b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a ∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b
   ∘ twist a (c ⊗ d) b)

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b) ∘ c ⊗R twist a d b ∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d)
∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ a ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) b $==
c ⊗R twist b d a ∘ c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid a d)
∘ (twist b c (a ⊗ d) ∘ b ⊗R twist a c d)
∘ (b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a ∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b)
∘ twist a (c ⊗ d) b

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b) ∘ c ⊗R twist a d b ∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d)
∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ a ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) b
∘ twist (c ⊗ d) a b $== c ⊗R twist b d a ∘ c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid a d)
∘ (twist b c (a ⊗ d) ∘ b ⊗R twist a c d)
∘ (b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a ∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b)

cat_tensor: A -> A -> A

Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b) ∘ c ⊗R twist a d b ∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d)
∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ a ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) b
∘ twist (c ⊗ d) a b $== c ⊗R twist b d a ∘ c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid a d)
∘ (twist b c (a ⊗ d) ∘ b ⊗R twist a c d)
∘ (b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a) ∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b) ∘ c ⊗R twist a d b ∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d)
∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ a ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) b
∘ twist (c ⊗ d) a b ∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid b a $== c ⊗R twist b d a
∘ c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid a d) ∘ (twist b c (a ⊗ d) ∘ b ⊗R twist a c d)
∘ (b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a)

∘ c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid a d) ∘ (twist b c (a ⊗ d) ∘ b ⊗R twist a c d)
∘ b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a

H0: HasEquivs A

cat_tensor_unit: A

Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))

(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==

twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit

c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘

∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘

c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b) ∘ c ⊗R twist a d b ∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d)
∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ a ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) b
∘ twist (c ⊗ d) a b ∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid b a ∘ twist b (c ⊗ d) a
∘ b ⊗R braid a (c ⊗ d) $== c ⊗R twist b d a ∘ c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid a d)
∘ (twist b c (a ⊗ d) ∘ b ⊗R twist a c d)

Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A

Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0

c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘

∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘

∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ a ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) b
∘ twist (c ⊗ d) a b ∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid b a ∘ twist b (c ⊗ d) a $==
c ⊗R twist b d a ∘ c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid a d) ∘ twist b c (a ⊗ d)
∘ b ⊗R twist a c d ∘ b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a

braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))

(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
