twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b) ∘ c ⊗R twist a d b ∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d)
∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ a ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) b
∘ twist (c ⊗ d) a b ∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid b a $== c ⊗R twist b d a
∘ c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid a d) ∘ twist b c (a ⊗ d) ∘ b ⊗R twist a c d
∘ b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b) ∘ c ⊗R twist a d b ∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d)
∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d) ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ a ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) b
∘ twist (c ⊗ d) a b $== c ⊗R twist b d a ∘ c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid a d)
∘ twist b c (a ⊗ d) ∘ b ⊗R twist a c d ∘ b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a
∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a ∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b)
∘ (c ⊗R twist a d b
   ∘ (c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d)
      ∘ (twist a c (b ⊗ d)
         ∘ (a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ (a ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) b ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) a b))))) $==
c ⊗R twist b d a ∘ c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid a d) ∘ twist b c (a ⊗ d)
∘ b ⊗R twist a c d ∘ b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a
∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b)
∘ (c ⊗R twist a d b ∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d) ∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d)
   ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ a ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) b ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) a b) $==
c ⊗R twist b d a ∘ c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid a d) ∘ twist b c (a ⊗ d)
∘ b ⊗R twist a c d ∘ b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a
∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b

    (** We can use the 9-gon to rewrite the LHS. *)
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
forall a' b' : A,
c ⊗R braid (b' ⊗ a') d ∘ twist (b' ⊗ a') c d ∘ braid (c ⊗ d) (b' ⊗ a') $==
c ⊗R twist b' d a' ∘ c ⊗R (b' ⊗R braid a' d) ∘ twist b' c (a' ⊗ d)
∘ b' ⊗R twist a' c d ∘ b' ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a' ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b' a'
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
p: forall a' b' : A,
c ⊗R braid (b' ⊗ a') d ∘ twist (b' ⊗ a') c d ∘ braid (c ⊗ d) (b' ⊗ a') $==
c ⊗R twist b' d a' ∘ c ⊗R (b' ⊗R braid a' d) ∘ twist b' c (a' ⊗ d)
∘ b' ⊗R twist a' c d ∘ b' ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a' ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b' a'
c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b)
∘ (c ⊗R twist a d b ∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d) ∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d)
   ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ a ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) b ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) a b) $==
c ⊗R twist b d a ∘ c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid a d) ∘ twist b c (a ⊗ d)
∘ b ⊗R twist a c d ∘ b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a
∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
forall a' b' : A,
c ⊗R braid (b' ⊗ a') d ∘ twist (b' ⊗ a') c d ∘ braid (c ⊗ d) (b' ⊗ a') $==
c ⊗R twist b' d a' ∘ c ⊗R (b' ⊗R braid a' d) ∘ twist b' c (a' ⊗ d)
∘ b' ⊗R twist a' c d ∘ b' ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a' ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b' a'
 
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a'0 b0 b'0 c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a'0) 
(g : b0 $-> b'0) (h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a'0 b'0 c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, a', b': A
c ⊗R braid (b' ⊗ a') d ∘ twist (b' ⊗ a') c d ∘ braid (c ⊗ d) (b' ⊗ a') $==
c ⊗R twist b' d a' ∘ c ⊗R (b' ⊗R braid a' d) ∘ twist b' c (a' ⊗ d)
∘ b' ⊗R twist a' c d ∘ b' ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a' ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b' a'

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a'0 b0 b'0 c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a'0) 
(g : b0 $-> b'0) (h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a'0 b'0 c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, a', b': A
c ⊗R braid (b' ⊗ a') d ∘ twist (b' ⊗ a') c d ∘ braid (c ⊗ d) (b' ⊗ a')
∘ twist b' (c ⊗ d) a' $== c ⊗R twist b' d a' ∘ c ⊗R (b' ⊗R braid a' d)
∘ twist b' c (a' ⊗ d) ∘ b' ⊗R twist a' c d ∘ b' ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a'

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a'0 b0 b'0 c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a'0) 
(g : b0 $-> b'0) (h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a'0 b'0 c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d, a', b': A
c ⊗R braid (b' ⊗ a') d ∘ twist (b' ⊗ a') c d ∘ braid (c ⊗ d) (b' ⊗ a')
∘ twist b' (c ⊗ d) a' ∘ b' ⊗R braid a' (c ⊗ d) $== 
c ⊗R twist b' d a' ∘ c ⊗R (b' ⊗R braid a' d) ∘ twist b' c (a' ⊗ d)
∘ b' ⊗R twist a' c d

      apply twist_9_gon. 
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
p: forall a' b' : A,
c ⊗R braid (b' ⊗ a') d ∘ twist (b' ⊗ a') c d ∘ braid (c ⊗ d) (b' ⊗ a') $==
c ⊗R twist b' d a' ∘ c ⊗R (b' ⊗R braid a' d) ∘ twist b' c (a' ⊗ d)
∘ b' ⊗R twist a' c d ∘ b' ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a' ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b' a'
c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b)
∘ (c ⊗R twist a d b ∘ c ⊗R (a ⊗R braid b d) ∘ twist a c (b ⊗ d)
   ∘ a ⊗R twist b c d ∘ a ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) b ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) a b) $==
c ⊗R twist b d a ∘ c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid a d) ∘ twist b c (a ⊗ d)
∘ b ⊗R twist a c d ∘ b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a
∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
p: forall a' b' : A,
c ⊗R braid (b' ⊗ a') d ∘ twist (b' ⊗ a') c d ∘ braid (c ⊗ d) (b' ⊗ a') $==
c ⊗R twist b' d a' ∘ c ⊗R (b' ⊗R braid a' d) ∘ twist b' c (a' ⊗ d)
∘ b' ⊗R twist a' c d ∘ b' ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a' ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b' a'
c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b)
∘ (c ⊗R braid (a ⊗ b) d ∘ twist (a ⊗ b) c d ∘ braid (c ⊗ d) (a ⊗ b)) $==
c ⊗R twist b d a ∘ c ⊗R (b ⊗R braid a d) ∘ twist b c (a ⊗ d)
∘ b ⊗R twist a c d ∘ b ⊗R braid (c ⊗ d) a ∘ twist (c ⊗ d) b a
∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b

    (** We can use the same 9-gon to rewrite the RHS. *)
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b)
∘ (c ⊗R braid (a ⊗ b) d ∘ twist (a ⊗ b) c d ∘ braid (c ⊗ d) (a ⊗ b)) $==
c ⊗R braid (b ⊗ a) d ∘ twist (b ⊗ a) c d ∘ braid (c ⊗ d) (b ⊗ a)
∘ (c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b

    (** This gives us an octagon composed of 3 naturality squares. *)
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
Square ((c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b) (c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b))
  (c ⊗R braid (a ⊗ b) d ∘ twist (a ⊗ b) c d ∘ braid (c ⊗ d) (a ⊗ b))
  (c ⊗R braid (b ⊗ a) d ∘ twist (b ⊗ a) c d ∘ braid (c ⊗ d) (b ⊗ a))

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
Square ((c ⊗ d) ⊗R braid a b) ?Goal (braid (c ⊗ d) (a ⊗ b))
  (braid (c ⊗ d) (b ⊗ a))
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
Square ?Goal (c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b))
  (c ⊗R braid (a ⊗ b) d ∘ twist (a ⊗ b) c d)
  (c ⊗R braid (b ⊗ a) d ∘ twist (b ⊗ a) c d)

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
Square (braid a b ⊗L (c ⊗ d)) (c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b))
  (c ⊗R braid (a ⊗ b) d ∘ twist (a ⊗ b) c d)
  (c ⊗R braid (b ⊗ a) d ∘ twist (b ⊗ a) c d)

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
Square (braid a b ⊗L (c ⊗ d)) ?Goal (twist (a ⊗ b) c d) (twist (b ⊗ a) c d)
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
Square ?Goal (c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b)) (c ⊗R braid (a ⊗ b) d)
  (c ⊗R braid (b ⊗ a) d)

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
Square (c ⊗R (braid a b ⊗L d)) (c ⊗R (d ⊗R braid a b)) 
  (c ⊗R braid (a ⊗ b) d) (c ⊗R braid (b ⊗ a) d)

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: HasEquivs A
cat_tensor: A -> A -> A
cat_tensor_unit: A
Is0Bifunctor0: Is0Bifunctor cat_tensor
Is1Bifunctor0: Is1Bifunctor cat_tensor
braid: SymmetricBraiding cat_tensor
twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, a0 ⊗ (b0 ⊗ c0) $-> b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0)
twist_twist: forall a0 b0 c0 : A, twist a0 b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0 $== Id (b0 ⊗ (a0 ⊗ c0))
twist_nat: forall (a0 a' b0 b' c0 c' : A) (f : a0 $-> a') (g : b0 $-> b')
(h : c0 $-> c'),
twist a' b' c' ∘ fmap11 cat_tensor f (fmap11 cat_tensor g h) $==
fmap11 cat_tensor g (fmap11 cat_tensor f h) ∘ twist a0 b0 c0
right_unitor: RightUnitor cat_tensor cat_tensor_unit
twist_unitor: forall a0 b0 : A,
a0 ⊗R right_unitor b0 $== braid b0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R right_unitor a0
∘ twist a0 b0 cat_tensor_unit
twist_hexagon: forall a0 b0 c0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid b0 a0 ∘ twist b0 c0 a0 ∘ b0 ⊗R braid a0 c0 $== 
twist a0 c0 b0 ∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 c0 ∘ twist b0 a0 c0
twist_9_gon: forall a0 b0 c0 d0 : A,
c0 ⊗R braid (a0 ⊗ b0) d0 ∘ twist (a0 ⊗ b0) c0 d0 ∘ 
braid (c0 ⊗ d0) (a0 ⊗ b0) ∘ twist a0 (c0 ⊗ d0) b0
∘ a0 ⊗R braid b0 (c0 ⊗ d0) $== c0 ⊗R twist a0 d0 b0
∘ c0 ⊗R (a0 ⊗R braid b0 d0) ∘ twist a0 c0 (b0 ⊗ d0) ∘ 
a0 ⊗R twist b0 c0 d0
a, b, c, d: A
Square (braid a b ⊗L d) (d ⊗R braid a b) (braid (a ⊗ b) d) (braid (b ⊗ a) d)

    apply transpose, braid_nat_l.
  Defined.

End TwistConstruction.
